testcase.name: test_autofill_only_no_ai

failure.message: AssertionError: missing autofill key features; got [] assert 'features' in []

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phoneme_batch_fill.py:147: in test_autofill_only_no_ai assert key in auto, f"missing autofill key {key}; got {auto}" E AssertionError: missing autofill key features; got [] E assert 'features' in []

testcase.name: test_edress_default_dialect_returns_404_due_to_seed_mismatch

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 404 (seed mismatch), got 200. If this now returns 200, the e-dress ipa='e'/GenAm mismatch has been fixed — update this test to expect 200. assert 200 == 404 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phoneme_batch_fill.py:255: in test_edress_default_dialect_returns_404_due_to_seed_mismatch assert r.status_code == 404, ( E AssertionError: expected 404 (seed mismatch), got 200. If this now returns 200, the e-dress ipa='e'/GenAm mismatch has been fixed — update this test to expect 200. E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
